user_query: Father likes eggs for breakfast. Add a classic egg based breakfast option for him on the day with the Smoky Base Pork Dinner

fields.name: Classic Sunny-Side Eggs with Toast & Sautéed Spinach
fields.short_description: Two sunny-side eggs served with whole-grain toast and quickly sautéed spinach and cherry tomatoes — a simple, protein-forward classic breakfast.
fields.meal_suggestion: Heat a small nonstick skillet with a teaspoon of olive oil or butter. Add a handful of baby spinach and halved cherry tomatoes; sauté briefly until wilted and tomatoes soften. In a separate skillet, lightly oil and cook two eggs sunny-side up (or cook to preferred doneness). Toast a slice of whole-grain bread. Plate the eggs over or beside the toast, add the sautéed spinach and tomatoes, and finish with a sprinkle of black pepper and a small pinch of flaky salt. Optional: add a thin slice of avocado or a light sprinkle of grated parmesan.
fields.nutrition_note: Provides high-quality protein from eggs to support satiety and morning energy; whole-grain toast adds complex carbohydrates and fiber; spinach and tomatoes deliver vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants. Keeping added fats moderate maintains a balanced calorie profile; optional avocado adds heart-healthy monounsaturated fats.

result.reasoning: Append a classic egg-based breakfast to Day 6's Father breakfast (the day associated with the smoky pork dinner). This straightforward egg plate matches the user's preference for eggs and complements the existing breakfast options on that day.
